history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, messy hair and white-rimmed sunglasses stands in the center of the frame, facing the camera with a neutral expression. He is wearing a black t-shirt with a detailed graphic print of a motorcycle and skeletal figures, a silver chain necklace, a white zip-up hoodie, and black pants adorned with silver, cross-like embellishments. His sneakers are black and white with a hint of orange.

The background is a textured, grey concrete wall covered in various vintage-style signs and decals. To the left, a red framed "EXIT" sign with glowing pink lettering is visible. Below it, smaller signs include "GUI SUPR MOTO," a circular "DAVIDSON" decal, and a license plate with the letter "E." To the right of the man, a large circular sign with red and white segments and a purple emblem is prominent. Further to the right, more framed signs and circular emblems are displayed, including one that reads "PATRO." Several circular metal elements resembling hubcaps or industrial fixtures are also embedded in the wall. Along the right edge of the image, a large, blue and white "Mobii" decal is visible, along with a smaller "TIRES" decal. The floor appears to be a dark, textured surface, possibly concrete or asphalt.

The lighting is somewhat dramatic, with highlights on the man's sunglasses and hoodie, and a general spotlight effect that draws attention to him. The overall color palette is a mix of dark tones (black, grey, dark blue) contrasted with bright pops of red, white, and yellow from the signs, as well as the silver accents on the man's clothing and the wall decorations. The mood is cool, urban, and slightly retro, with a focus on automotive and motorcycle culture. The style is realistic with a slightly stylized, almost gritty aesthetic due to the background elements.
